TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ciw-fun šĻĚšĽĹ == Ciw-fun itida i Taypei sinpei-se Zuafan a kitidaan, atu kilung masasuayaw, i masalikelunay ku eneng nina niyadu', mala micidekay a masalikelunay atu masakayakayay a luma'an. sumamad u kim kacelakan, nai' tu ku kakutkuten sa hamaw satu masapakuyucay. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan a mihcaan sa, ina kacudu itini miala tu aadihan, picidekan nu malumanay a luma'an, likelun atu aadihan sipakayda i kacudu ku sakatineng nu katuuday, sisa culak satu kina niyadu', mala tataydaan nu katuuday midang. sakasingangananŚúįŚźćÁ∑£ÁĒĪ Ciw-fun, tidaay a tademaw u Ciw-fun na " ngangan nu Taywan: K√°u-hŇęn-√°", kasinganganan mahida u Taywan nu milecaday nu malumanay a ngangan, mahida u layak mitadasay a tademaw tu wini ku makusa, pangangan sa kaca u saasip ku suli cunus han tu "ku", "hun", "kuy", "cea" kasinganganan. tatengan nu kamuan sa: tawyaay a binawlan salamien ku dakes misadakes a sima ku sasibayan, siwa a bataan ku misalami'ay, cacay a bataan ku cacay a sausi, pulung han siwa. 77 148 kaDipunan nu Taywan, niyadu' nu Ciw-fun pala " ken-cay-liaw-cun" a nikuwanan, walian a niyadu'an u Cin-kua-se u "Ciw-fun-cung" a mikuwanay, ina tusaay a niyadu'an u Kilun paw ku sausi. acay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan a mamihcaan " tacen siwa mihcaan" pulung nu kitidaan sumaden namin, sihu nu Dipun kenih han ku Ken-cay-liaw-cun, ciw-fun sumad han u " ken-cay-liaw" tusa a tabakiay a sulit. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan " caw-he " walu mihcaan" , sakamusa ku Taywan-cung-tu-hu " ciw-fun" tabakiay a sulit sumad han tu " Cin-kua-se" tabakiay a sulitan. 'ciw-fun" šĻĚšĽĹ Kilung a sauwacan itida i cin-caw idawtu ku kamu tu kasiekiman, itawya tu cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan siwa a lasubu idaw ku siwa a mihcaan tunipisangan tu Kilung Taypei a silamalay nu dadan idaw tu ku makaadihay tu kiman, misangaay a tademaw itida i Pa-tu capi a sauwacan namakaadih tu i likenan a kim man, haymaw sa tapabaw i Ta-cu-keng. Ciw-fun itida i caywalsiwlu mihcaan makaadih tu kim, caywalsiwtu mihcaan cin-kua-se buyu idaw ku kim, nanutawya lingtu satu idaw ku taydaay mi'kim namakayni ku sakalingatu nu luitan. . kaDipunan sa, ya Dipun a tademaw atu Kilungay a tademaw ci Yen se a luma'an kakilukilul sa idaw ku ciw-fun a kinli nu heni, picidekan nipisiwbayan nu Yen-cia, u Ciw-hun sakacelakan itawya a zitayan, malecad tuya a zitayan idaw ku nipikutkut nuheni tu sumi. kasenengan i tawya, idaw ku kamu: " kapahay pasinubu tu kim, u mikilulay tu kapah sipatayda i Tay-pei." kaDipunan, Zuy-fun ciw-fun cinsan a ba'tuan makaala tu 189 wan nu pinan, tawya atu Cin-kua-se atu U-dan-ken saan u Taywan sakatulu a Cin-san. itida i caysiwseplu mihcaan katukuh tu caysiwsepsip mihcaan, tawyaay a Taywan a kiman nu cacay a mihcaan nu kasibekan atu Dipun nu kasibekan malecad. . u Ciw-fun atu Cin-kua-se ukim ku kasilaculan, hinaala kita tinatusaay a kitidaan a makasimsim, nika ina tusaay a nipikuwan atu nipiala tu kiman caay kalecad, ba'tu a lalangawan atu sakaudip caay kalecad, ciw-fun namaka Dipun tu hedek nikalepacawan, sipabeli nuheni i Tay-yen kusi mikuwan, idaw ku tanayu'ay a demiadan sipa'baw itawan, ina Cin-kua-se niyadu'an a kim u nuhenitu ku mikuwnay, caay henay papi'baw i tawan, hucunu a demiadan u sakakaay ku misiwbayay.caysiwsiplim mihcaan nadikudan a nikalepacawan, mi'kimay i Ciw-fun namacuwah tu, nika i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan hamaw satu tadikud, sadikuday itida i caysiwpiccay mihcaan tatengan itawya mihedek a mi'kim, hatidaay a mikuliay nu tademawan pasayda namin i nipikutkut tu sumi. . aidangan ŤßÄŚÖČ tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay a mihcaan, Ciw-fun patiyamay tatengan palekal tu Ciw-fun patiyamay a masakaputay. tasa a malebut idaw ku walu sabaw cacay a bulad nu hedek, u cin-ci-pu' sikawaw tu " sapatideng tu baluhay a papatinakuan a kiyaku, u Ciw-fun niyadu'an patideng tu wan-can, caay pakalisiwan miWI-FI" u liwliw katukuh i Ci-san patiyamay atu Su-ci-dadan kalimulakan a niyaduan, makaala tu 90% a niyaduan makaal tu Wi-Fi a nikatengilan", kasidingkian a pisiwbayan, kalamkamay a maala nu sasingan " taneng miadih tu aadihan, tademaw, atu dimiad", QR Code " sakay pisiwkayan tu patiyamay a tuudan" u sakalecad nu gigicuan, nu sumamaday a Ciw-fun macunus malaaydaay a cacukaymasan. 2001ŚĻī, Wi-Fi ,ÁīĄ90%ŚćÄŚüüŚŹĮśĒ∂ŚąįWi-Fi ,QR CodeÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ . picidekan ÁČĻŤČ≤ malumanay nu patiyamay a ciw-funšĻĚšĽĹŤÄĀŤ°ó malumanay nu ciw-fun patiyamay katuud ku taydaay midang, nu yadahay a dadanan a nikapulungan nu masacacayan a dadanan, nu taywan ku sakasingangan. sakalimulakay a dadan angangan itida i Ci-san-cea, su-ci-dadan atu sakalihalay a patiyamay nu dadanan. . ci-san-patiyamay "Taywan a kamu: Ki-san-ke" idaw ku " tawyaay a ciw-fun" a ngangan, sakalimulakan nu ciw-fun a dadanan, nanutawya naw kapulungan nu binacadan tu labii' itida, sisa yu mahida u An-cea-cay " kamu nu Taywan: √Äm-ke-√°, amica kunikau hucu nu dimiadan atu pilipayan macacelceltu ku tademaw tayda i tida midang, kakanan tu tubah talai, sayaway nu milingatuay misiwbay, makaala tu cacay a lasubuan nu mihcaan a luitan nu sangan a luma' itida i Ciw-fun, atu Ciw-fun lalngawan a kakakulian aluma itida a patideng, idaw ku aadihan tu mabataday nu bayuan. Ci-sa-cea ilabuay a ciw-cung-cei u malumanay nu ciw-fun a sangan nu luma'an,kalawlawan nu dingki mahida u malumanay a kitidaan adihan. ŚüļŚĪĪŤ°ó(ŤáļŤ™ě:Ki-san-ke):śúČ" (ŤáļŤ™ě:√Äm-ke-√°), . nu tayaay a kakanenśá∑ŤąäÁĺéť£ü ciw-fun duduc sa tunutawyaay a kakanen, sakamusa u tali a mulimuli atu tuba a mulimuli, idaw henay ku namaka tubah atu taliay a nakanan, idaw henay ku wadayan a mulimuli atu picidekan tu uciya , deka atu kaletu nu kakanan, cu'detay akutiay idaw namin, bangsisay asu'ay a talian nu kukuyan, kalaaahcidan a kala'paay nu kukuyan, idaw ku nitabu ilabu tu nidusdusan tu saytaw " dusdusen ku saytaw" atu kabus a kalapa' a kukuy, sumanahay nu tamudan a sibasisay i labu nu mulimulian u ngasaw a nisangaan tu sakay lalabuay a sangaan, patudud han tu mamuniay a hekal atu nipicidekan nu sangan a tawyuan, idaw henay ku lumeniay a wanengan a tunucan, atu tawzi, lumeniay a ti'kukan nu asuay a kakanen. . pakungkuan tu di'tu a nipahelak a paadih ť¨ľśÄ™Śā≥Ť™™ÁČĻŚĪē Ciw-fun " papatinakuan tu di'tu a kakungkuan" tangsul sa patalaw tu saleniay, ayda malingatu a sikawaw, sayaway u nipatinaku dada', tayda i Sen-pin kacuduan tu panan idaw ku nipadeng tu enemay a di'tuan itida, idaw ku maacakay nu di'tuan, ilabuay nu bayuan nu mahicaay nu butingan a sapahelak a patinaku. šĻĚšĽĹ" .
S.PHON: == ¶iw-fun ** == ¶iw-fun itida i tajp…ôi sinp…ôi-s…ô zuafan a kitidaan, atu kir~…ĺuŇč masasuajaw, i masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj ku …ôn…ôŇč nina nijadu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj a masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj atu masakajakajaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. sumamad u kim ka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan, nai Ē~ ° tu ku kakutkut…ôn sa ńßamaw satu masapakuju ¶aj. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan a mińß ¶aan sa, ina ka ¶udu itini miar~…ĺa tu aadińßan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺun atu aadińßan sipakajda i ka ¶udu ku sakatin…ôŇč nu katuudaj, sisa ¶ur~…ĺak satu kina nijadu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu katuudaj midaŇč. sakasiŇčaŇčanan**** ¶iw-fun, tidaaj a tad…ômaw u ¶iw-fun na " ŇčaŇčan nu tajwan: k*u-ńß*n-*", kasiŇčaŇčanan mańßida u tajwan nu mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan, mańßida u r~…ĺajak mitadasaj a tad…ômaw tu wini ku makusa, paŇčaŇčan sa ka ¶a u saasip ku sur~…ĺi ¶unus ńßan tu "ku", "ńßun", "kuj", " ¶…ôa" kasiŇčaŇčanan. tat…ôŇčan nu kamuan sa: tawjaaj a binawr~…ĺan sar~…ĺami…ôn ku dak…ôs misadak…ôs a sima ku sasibajan, siwa a bataan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku ¶a ¶aj a sausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan siwa. ** *** kadipunan nu tajwan, nijadu Ē~ ° nu ¶iw-fun par~…ĺa " k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw- ¶un" a nikuwanan, war~…ĺian a nijadu Ē~ °an u ¶in-kua-s…ô u " ¶iw-fun- ¶uŇč" a mikuwanaj, ina tusaaj a nijadu Ē~ °an u kir~…ĺun paw ku sausi. a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan a mamińß ¶aan " ta ¶…ôn siwa mińß ¶aan" pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitidaan sumad…ôn namin, sińßu nu dipun k…ônińß ńßan ku k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw- ¶un, ¶iw-fun sumad ńßan u " k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw" tusa a tabakiaj a sur~…ĺit. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan " ¶aw-ńß…ô " war~…ĺu mińß ¶aan" , sakamusa ku tajwan- ¶uŇč-tu-ńßu " ¶iw-fun" tabakiaj a sur~…ĺit sumad ńßan tu " ¶in-kua-s…ô" tabakiaj a sur~…ĺitan. Ē~ ° ¶iw-fun" ** kir~…ĺuŇč a sauwa ¶an itida i ¶in- ¶aw idawtu ku kamu tu kasi…ôkiman, itawja tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan tunipisaŇčan tu kir~…ĺuŇč tajp…ôi a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu dadan idaw tu ku makaadińßaj tu kiman, misaŇčaaj a tad…ômaw itida i pa-tu ¶api a sauwa ¶an namakaadińß tu i r~…ĺik…ônan a kim man, ńßajmaw sa tapabaw i ta- ¶u-k…ôŇč. ¶iw-fun itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan makaadińß tu kim, ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwtu mińß ¶aan ¶in-kua-s…ô buju idaw ku kim, nanutawja r~…ĺiŇčtu satu idaw ku tajdaaj mi Ē~ °kim namakajni ku sakar~…ĺiŇčatu nu r~…ĺuitan. . kadipunan sa, ja dipun a tad…ômaw atu kir~…ĺuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i j…ôn s…ô a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa idaw ku ¶iw-fun a kinr~…ĺi nu ńß…ôni, pi ¶id…ôkan nipisiwbajan nu j…ôn- ¶ia, u ¶iw-ńßun saka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan itawja a zitajan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuja a zitajan idaw ku nipikutkut nuńß…ôni tu sumi. kas…ôn…ôŇčan i tawja, idaw ku kamu: " kapańßaj pasinubu tu kim, u mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu kapańß sipatajda i taj-p…ôi." kadipunan, zuj-fun ¶iw-fun ¶insan a ba Ē~ °tuan makaar~…ĺa tu *** wan nu pinan, tawja atu ¶in-kua-s…ô atu u-dan-k…ôn saan u tajwan sakatur~…ĺu a ¶in-san. itida i ¶ajsiws…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu ¶ajsiws…ôpsip mińß ¶aan, tawjaaj a tajwan a kiman nu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan nu kasib…ôkan atu dipun nu kasib…ôkan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. . u ¶iw-fun atu ¶in-kua-s…ô ukim ku kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, ńßinaar~…ĺa kita tinatusaaj a kitidaan a makasimsim, nika ina tusaaj a nipikuwan atu nipiar~…ĺa tu kiman ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu sakaudip ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ¶iw-fun namaka dipun tu ńß…ôd…ôk nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, sipab…ôr~…ĺi nuńß…ôni i taj-j…ôn kusi mikuwan, idaw ku tanaju Ē~ °aj a d…ômiadan sipa Ē~ °baw itawan, ina ¶in-kua-s…ô nijadu Ē~ °an a kim u nuńß…ônitu ku mikuwnaj, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj papi Ē~ °baw i tawan, ńßu ¶unu a d…ômiadan u sakakaaj ku misiwbajaj. ¶ajsiwsipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan nadikudan a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, mi Ē~ °kimaj i ¶iw-fun nama ¶uwańß tu, nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ńßamaw satu tadikud, sadikudaj itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇčan itawja mińß…ôd…ôk a mi Ē~ °kim, ńßatidaaj a mikur~…ĺiaj nu tad…ômawan pasajda namin i nipikutkut tu sumi. . aidaŇčan ** tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, ¶iw-fun patijamaj tat…ôŇčan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶iw-fun patijamaj a masakaputaj. tasa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad nu ńß…ôd…ôk, u ¶in- ¶i-pu Ē~ ° sikawaw tu " sapatid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a papatinakuan a kijaku, u ¶iw-fun nijadu Ē~ °an patid…ôŇč tu wan- ¶an, ¶aaj pakar~…ĺisiwan miwi-fi" u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw katukuńß i ¶i-san patijamaj atu su- ¶i-dadan kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a nijaduan, makaar~…ĺa tu **% a nijaduan makaar~…ĺ tu wi-fi a nikat…ôŇčir~…ĺan", kasidiŇčkian a pisiwbajan, kar~…ĺamkamaj a maar~…ĺa nu sasiŇčan " tan…ôŇč miadińß tu aadińßan, tad…ômaw, atu dimiad", ** ¶od…ô " sakaj pisiwkajan tu patijamaj a tuudan" u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu gigi ¶uan, nu sumamadaj a ¶iw-fun ma ¶unus mar~…ĺaajdaaj a ¶a ¶ukajmasan. *****, wi-fi ,***%*****wi-fi ,** ¶od…ô** . pi ¶id…ôkan ** mar~…ĺumanaj nu patijamaj a ¶iw-fun**** mar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶iw-fun patijamaj katuud ku tajdaaj midaŇč, nu jadańßaj a dadanan a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu masa ¶a ¶ajan a dadanan, nu tajwan ku sakasiŇčaŇčan. sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a dadan aŇčaŇčan itida i ¶i-san- ¶…ôa, su- ¶i-dadan atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patijamaj nu dadanan. . ¶i-san-patijamaj "tajwan a kamu: ki-san-k…ô" idaw ku " tawjaaj a ¶iw-fun" a ŇčaŇčan, sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan nu ¶iw-fun a dadanan, nanutawja naw kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu bina ¶adan tu r~…ĺabii Ē~ ° itida, sisa ju mańßida u an- ¶…ôa- ¶aj " kamu nu tajwan: *m-k…ô-*, ami ¶a kunikau ńßu ¶u nu dimiadan atu pir~…ĺipajan ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺtu ku tad…ômaw tajda i tida midaŇč, kakanan tu tubańß tar~…ĺai, sajawaj nu mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj misiwbaj, makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺuitan nu saŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° itida i ¶iw-fun, atu ¶iw-fun r~…ĺar~…ĺŇčawan a kakakur~…ĺian ar~…ĺuma itida a patid…ôŇč, idaw ku aadińßan tu mabatadaj nu bajuan. ¶i-sa- ¶…ôa ir~…ĺabuaj a ¶iw- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôi u mar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶iw-fun a saŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an,kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu diŇčki mańßida u mar~…ĺumanaj a kitidaan adińßan. ***(**:ki-san-k…ô):*" (**:*m-k…ô-*), . nu tajaaj a kakan…ôn**** ¶iw-fun dudu ¶ sa tunutawjaaj a kakan…ôn, sakamusa u tar~…ĺi a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi atu tuba a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi, idaw ńß…ônaj ku namaka tubańß atu tar~…ĺiaj a nakanan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku wadajan a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi atu pi ¶id…ôkan tu u ¶ija , d…ôka atu kar~…ĺ…ôtu nu kakanan, ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj akutiaj idaw namin, baŇčsisaj asu Ē~ °aj a tar~…ĺian nu kukujan, kar~…ĺaaańß ¶idan a kar~…ĺa Ē~ °paaj nu kukujan, idaw ku nitabu ir~…ĺabu tu nidusdusan tu sajtaw " dusdus…ôn ku sajtaw" atu kabus a kar~…ĺapa Ē~ ° a kukuj, sumanańßaj nu tamudan a sibasisaj i r~…ĺabu nu mur~…ĺimur~…ĺian u Ňčasaw a nisaŇčaan tu sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj a saŇčaan, patudud ńßan tu mamuniaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu nipi ¶id…ôkan nu saŇčan a tawjuan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj a wan…ôŇčan a tunu ¶an, atu tawzi, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ti Ē~ °kukan nu asuaj a kakan…ôn. . pakuŇčkuan tu di Ē~ °tu a nipańß…ôr~…ĺak a paadińß ****** ¶iw-fun " papatinakuan tu di Ē~ °tu a kakuŇčkuan" taŇčsur~…ĺ sa patar~…ĺaw tu sar~…ĺ…ôniaj, ajda mar~…ĺiŇčatu a sikawaw, sajawaj u nipatinaku dada Ē~ °, tajda i s…ôn-pin ka ¶uduan tu panan idaw ku nipad…ôŇč tu …ôn…ômaj a di Ē~ °tuan itida, idaw ku maa ¶akaj nu di Ē~ °tuan, ir~…ĺabuaj nu bajuan nu mańßi ¶aaj nu butiŇčan a sapańß…ôr~…ĺak a patinaku. **" .
S.FORM: == Ciw-fun šĻĚšĽĹ == Ciw-fun itida i Taypei sinpei-se Zuafan a kitidaan, atu kilung masasuayaw, i masalikelunay ku eneng nina niyadu', mala micidekay a masalikelunay atu masakayakayay a luma'an. sumamad u kim kacelakan, nai' tu ku kakutkuten sa hamaw satu masapakuyucay. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan a mihcaan sa, ina kacudu itini miala tu aadihan, picidekan nu malumanay a luma'an, likelun atu aadihan sipakayda i kacudu ku sakatineng nu katuuday, sisa culak satu kina niyadu', mala tataydaan nu katuuday midang. sakasingangananŚúįŚźćÁ∑£ÁĒĪ Ciw-fun, tidaay a tademaw u Ciw-fun na " ngangan nu Taywan: K√°u-hŇęn-√°", kasinganganan mahida u Taywan nu milecaday nu malumanay a ngangan, mahida u layak mitadasay a tademaw tu wini ku makusa, pangangan sa kaca u saasip ku suli cunus han tu "ku", "hun", "kuy", "cea" kasinganganan. tatengan nu kamuan sa: tawyaay a binawlan salamien ku dakes misadakes a sima ku sasibayan, siwa a bataan ku misalami'ay, cacay a bataan ku cacay a sausi, pulung han siwa. 77 148 kaDipunan nu Taywan, niyadu' nu Ciw-fun pala " ken-cay-liaw-cun" a nikuwanan, walian a niyadu'an u Cin-kua-se u "Ciw-fun-cung" a mikuwanay, ina tusaay a niyadu'an u Kilun paw ku sausi. acay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan a mamihcaan " tacen siwa mihcaan" pulung nu kitidaan sumaden namin, sihu nu Dipun kenih han ku Ken-cay-liaw-cun, ciw-fun sumad han u " ken-cay-liaw" tusa a tabakiay a sulit. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan " caw-he " walu mihcaan" , sakamusa ku Taywan-cung-tu-hu " ciw-fun" tabakiay a sulit sumad han tu " Cin-kua-se" tabakiay a sulitan. 'ciw-fun" šĻĚšĽĹ Kilung a sauwacan itida i cin-caw idawtu ku kamu tu kasiekiman, itawya tu cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan siwa a lasubu idaw ku siwa a mihcaan tunipisangan tu Kilung Taypei a silamalay nu dadan idaw tu ku makaadihay tu kiman, misangaay a tademaw itida i Pa-tu capi a sauwacan namakaadih tu i likenan a kim man, haymaw sa tapabaw i Ta-cu-keng. Ciw-fun itida i caywalsiwlu mihcaan makaadih tu kim, caywalsiwtu mihcaan cin-kua-se buyu idaw ku kim, nanutawya lingtu satu idaw ku taydaay mi'kim namakayni ku sakalingatu nu luitan. . kaDipunan sa, ya Dipun a tademaw atu Kilungay a tademaw ci Yen se a luma'an kakilukilul sa idaw ku ciw-fun a kinli nu heni, picidekan nipisiwbayan nu Yen-cia, u Ciw-hun sakacelakan itawya a zitayan, malecad tuya a zitayan idaw ku nipikutkut nuheni tu sumi. kasenengan i tawya, idaw ku kamu: " kapahay pasinubu tu kim, u mikilulay tu kapah sipatayda i Tay-pei." kaDipunan, Zuy-fun ciw-fun cinsan a ba'tuan makaala tu 189 wan nu pinan, tawya atu Cin-kua-se atu U-dan-ken saan u Taywan sakatulu a Cin-san. itida i caysiwseplu mihcaan katukuh tu caysiwsepsip mihcaan, tawyaay a Taywan a kiman nu cacay a mihcaan nu kasibekan atu Dipun nu kasibekan malecad. . u Ciw-fun atu Cin-kua-se ukim ku kasilaculan, hinaala kita tinatusaay a kitidaan a makasimsim, nika ina tusaay a nipikuwan atu nipiala tu kiman caay kalecad, ba'tu a lalangawan atu sakaudip caay kalecad, ciw-fun namaka Dipun tu hedek nikalepacawan, sipabeli nuheni i Tay-yen kusi mikuwan, idaw ku tanayu'ay a demiadan sipa'baw itawan, ina Cin-kua-se niyadu'an a kim u nuhenitu ku mikuwnay, caay henay papi'baw i tawan, hucunu a demiadan u sakakaay ku misiwbayay.caysiwsiplim mihcaan nadikudan a nikalepacawan, mi'kimay i Ciw-fun namacuwah tu, nika i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan hamaw satu tadikud, sadikuday itida i caysiwpiccay mihcaan tatengan itawya mihedek a mi'kim, hatidaay a mikuliay nu tademawan pasayda namin i nipikutkut tu sumi. . aidangan ŤßÄŚÖČ tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay a mihcaan, Ciw-fun patiyamay tatengan palekal tu Ciw-fun patiyamay a masakaputay. tasa a malebut idaw ku walu sabaw cacay a bulad nu hedek, u cin-ci-pu' sikawaw tu " sapatideng tu baluhay a papatinakuan a kiyaku, u Ciw-fun niyadu'an patideng tu wan-can, caay pakalisiwan miWI-FI" u liwliw katukuh i Ci-san patiyamay atu Su-ci-dadan kalimulakan a niyaduan, makaala tu 90% a niyaduan makaal tu Wi-Fi a nikatengilan", kasidingkian a pisiwbayan, kalamkamay a maala nu sasingan " taneng miadih tu aadihan, tademaw, atu dimiad", QR Code " sakay pisiwkayan tu patiyamay a tuudan" u sakalecad nu gigicuan, nu sumamaday a Ciw-fun macunus malaaydaay a cacukaymasan. 2001ŚĻī, Wi-Fi ,ÁīĄ90%ŚćÄŚüüŚŹĮśĒ∂ŚąįWi-Fi ,QR CodeÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ . picidekan ÁČĻŤČ≤ malumanay nu patiyamay a ciw-funšĻĚšĽĹŤÄĀŤ°ó malumanay nu ciw-fun patiyamay katuud ku taydaay midang, nu yadahay a dadanan a nikapulungan nu masacacayan a dadanan, nu taywan ku sakasingangan. sakalimulakay a dadan angangan itida i Ci-san-cea, su-ci-dadan atu sakalihalay a patiyamay nu dadanan. . ci-san-patiyamay "Taywan a kamu: Ki-san-ke" idaw ku " tawyaay a ciw-fun" a ngangan, sakalimulakan nu ciw-fun a dadanan, nanutawya naw kapulungan nu binacadan tu labii' itida, sisa yu mahida u An-cea-cay " kamu nu Taywan: √Äm-ke-√°, amica kunikau hucu nu dimiadan atu pilipayan macacelceltu ku tademaw tayda i tida midang, kakanan tu tubah talai, sayaway nu milingatuay misiwbay, makaala tu cacay a lasubuan nu mihcaan a luitan nu sangan a luma' itida i Ciw-fun, atu Ciw-fun lalngawan a kakakulian aluma itida a patideng, idaw ku aadihan tu mabataday nu bayuan. Ci-sa-cea ilabuay a ciw-cung-cei u malumanay nu ciw-fun a sangan nu luma'an,kalawlawan nu dingki mahida u malumanay a kitidaan adihan. ŚüļŚĪĪŤ°ó(ŤáļŤ™ě:Ki-san-ke):śúČ" (ŤáļŤ™ě:√Äm-ke-√°), . nu tayaay a kakanenśá∑ŤąäÁĺéť£ü ciw-fun duduc sa tunutawyaay a kakanen, sakamusa u tali a mulimuli atu tuba a mulimuli, idaw henay ku namaka tubah atu taliay a nakanan, idaw henay ku wadayan a mulimuli atu picidekan tu uciya , deka atu kaletu nu kakanan, cu'detay akutiay idaw namin, bangsisay asu'ay a talian nu kukuyan, kalaaahcidan a kala'paay nu kukuyan, idaw ku nitabu ilabu tu nidusdusan tu saytaw " dusdusen ku saytaw" atu kabus a kalapa' a kukuy, sumanahay nu tamudan a sibasisay i labu nu mulimulian u ngasaw a nisangaan tu sakay lalabuay a sangaan, patudud han tu mamuniay a hekal atu nipicidekan nu sangan a tawyuan, idaw henay ku lumeniay a wanengan a tunucan, atu tawzi, lumeniay a ti'kukan nu asuay a kakanen. . pakungkuan tu di'tu a nipahelak a paadih ť¨ľśÄ™Śā≥Ť™™ÁČĻŚĪē Ciw-fun " papatinakuan tu di'tu a kakungkuan" tangsul sa patalaw tu saleniay, ayda malingatu a sikawaw, sayaway u nipatinaku dada', tayda i Sen-pin kacuduan tu panan idaw ku nipadeng tu enemay a di'tuan itida, idaw ku maacakay nu di'tuan, ilabuay nu bayuan nu mahicaay nu butingan a sapahelak a patinaku. šĻĚšĽĹ" .
S.PHON: == ¶iw-fun ** == ¶iw-fun itida i tajp…ôi sinp…ôi-s…ô zuafan a kitidaan, atu kir~…ĺuŇč masasuajaw, i masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj ku …ôn…ôŇč nina nijadu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj a masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj atu masakajakajaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. sumamad u kim ka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan, nai Ē~ ° tu ku kakutkut…ôn sa ńßamaw satu masapakuju ¶aj. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan a mińß ¶aan sa, ina ka ¶udu itini miar~…ĺa tu aadińßan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺun atu aadińßan sipakajda i ka ¶udu ku sakatin…ôŇč nu katuudaj, sisa ¶ur~…ĺak satu kina nijadu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu katuudaj midaŇč. sakasiŇčaŇčanan**** ¶iw-fun, tidaaj a tad…ômaw u ¶iw-fun na " ŇčaŇčan nu tajwan: k*u-ńß*n-*", kasiŇčaŇčanan mańßida u tajwan nu mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan, mańßida u r~…ĺajak mitadasaj a tad…ômaw tu wini ku makusa, paŇčaŇčan sa ka ¶a u saasip ku sur~…ĺi ¶unus ńßan tu "ku", "ńßun", "kuj", " ¶…ôa" kasiŇčaŇčanan. tat…ôŇčan nu kamuan sa: tawjaaj a binawr~…ĺan sar~…ĺami…ôn ku dak…ôs misadak…ôs a sima ku sasibajan, siwa a bataan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku ¶a ¶aj a sausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan siwa. ** *** kadipunan nu tajwan, nijadu Ē~ ° nu ¶iw-fun par~…ĺa " k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw- ¶un" a nikuwanan, war~…ĺian a nijadu Ē~ °an u ¶in-kua-s…ô u " ¶iw-fun- ¶uŇč" a mikuwanaj, ina tusaaj a nijadu Ē~ °an u kir~…ĺun paw ku sausi. a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan a mamińß ¶aan " ta ¶…ôn siwa mińß ¶aan" pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitidaan sumad…ôn namin, sińßu nu dipun k…ônińß ńßan ku k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw- ¶un, ¶iw-fun sumad ńßan u " k…ôn- ¶aj-r~…ĺiaw" tusa a tabakiaj a sur~…ĺit. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan " ¶aw-ńß…ô " war~…ĺu mińß ¶aan" , sakamusa ku tajwan- ¶uŇč-tu-ńßu " ¶iw-fun" tabakiaj a sur~…ĺit sumad ńßan tu " ¶in-kua-s…ô" tabakiaj a sur~…ĺitan. Ē~ ° ¶iw-fun" ** kir~…ĺuŇč a sauwa ¶an itida i ¶in- ¶aw idawtu ku kamu tu kasi…ôkiman, itawja tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan tunipisaŇčan tu kir~…ĺuŇč tajp…ôi a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu dadan idaw tu ku makaadińßaj tu kiman, misaŇčaaj a tad…ômaw itida i pa-tu ¶api a sauwa ¶an namakaadińß tu i r~…ĺik…ônan a kim man, ńßajmaw sa tapabaw i ta- ¶u-k…ôŇč. ¶iw-fun itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan makaadińß tu kim, ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwtu mińß ¶aan ¶in-kua-s…ô buju idaw ku kim, nanutawja r~…ĺiŇčtu satu idaw ku tajdaaj mi Ē~ °kim namakajni ku sakar~…ĺiŇčatu nu r~…ĺuitan. . kadipunan sa, ja dipun a tad…ômaw atu kir~…ĺuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i j…ôn s…ô a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa idaw ku ¶iw-fun a kinr~…ĺi nu ńß…ôni, pi ¶id…ôkan nipisiwbajan nu j…ôn- ¶ia, u ¶iw-ńßun saka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan itawja a zitajan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuja a zitajan idaw ku nipikutkut nuńß…ôni tu sumi. kas…ôn…ôŇčan i tawja, idaw ku kamu: " kapańßaj sakatur~…ĺu a ¶in-san. itida i ¶ajsiws…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu ¶ajsiws…ôpsip mińß ¶aan, tawjaaj a tajwan a kiman nu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan nu kasib…ôkan atu dipun nu kasib…ôkan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. . u ¶iw-fun atu ¶in-kua-s…ô ukim ku kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, ńßinaar~…ĺa kita tinatusaaj a kitidaan a makasimsim, nika ina tusaaj a nipikuwan atu nipiar~…ĺa tu kiman ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ba Ē~ °tu a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, mi Ē~ °kimaj i ¶iw-fun nama ¶uwańß tu, nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ńßamaw satu tadikud, sadikudaj itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶ ¶aj patijamaj tat…ôŇčan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶iw-fun patijamaj a masakaputaj. tasa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad nu ńß…ôd…ôk, u ¶in- ¶i-pu Ē~ ° sikawaw tu " sapatid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a papatinakuan a kijaku, u ¶iw-fun nijadu Ē~ °an patid…ôŇč tu wan- ¶an, ¶aaj pakar~…ĺisiwan miwi-fi" u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw katukuńß i ¶i-san patijamaj atu su- ¶i-dadan kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a nijaduan, makaar~…ĺa tu **% a nijaduan makaar~…ĺ tu wi-fi a nikat…ôŇčir~…ĺan", kasidiŇčkian a pisiwbajan, kar~…ĺamkamaj a maar~…ĺa nu sasiŇčan " tan…ôŇč miadińß tu aadińßan, tad…ômaw, atu dimiad", ** ¶od…ô " sakaj pisiwkajan tu patijamaj a tuudan" u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu gigi ¶uan, nu sumamadaj a ¶iw-fun ma ¶unus mar~…ĺaajdaaj a ¶a ¶ukajmasan. *****, wi-fi ,***%*****wi-fi ,** ¶od…ô** . pi ¶id…ôkan ** mar~…ĺumanaj nu patijamaj a ¶iw-fun**** mar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶iw-fun patijamaj katuud ku tajdaaj midaŇč, nu jadańßaj a dadanan a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu masa ¶a ¶ajan a dadanan, nu tajwan ku sakasiŇčaŇčan. sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a dadan aŇčaŇčan itida i ¶i-san- ¶…ôa, su- ¶i-dadan atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patijamaj nu dadanan. . ¶i-san-patijamaj "tajwan a kamu: ki-san-k…ô" idaw ku " tawjaaj a ¶iw-fun" a ¶…ôi u mar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶iw-fun a saŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an,kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu diŇčki mańßida u mar~…ĺumanaj a kitidaan adińßan. ***(**:ki-san-k…ô):*" (**:*m-k…ô-*), . nu tajaaj a kakan…ôn**** ¶iw-fun dudu ¶ sa tunutawjaaj a kakan…ôn, sakamusa u tar~…ĺi a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi atu tuba a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi, idaw ńß…ônaj ku namaka tubańß atu tar~…ĺiaj a nakanan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku wadajan a mur~…ĺimur~…ĺi atu pi ¶id…ôkan tu u ¶ija , d…ôka atu kar~…ĺ…ôtu nu kakanan, ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj akutiaj idaw namin, baŇčsisaj asu Ē~ °aj a tar~…ĺian nu kukujan, kar~…ĺaaańß ¶idan a kar~…ĺa Ē~ °paaj nu kukujan, idaw ku nitabu ir~…ĺabu tu nidusdusan tu sajtaw " dusdus…ôn ku sajtaw" atu kabus a kar~…ĺapa Ē~ ° a kukuj, sumanańßaj nu tamudan a sibasisaj i r~…ĺabu nu mur~…ĺimur~…ĺian u Ňčasaw a nisaŇčaan tu sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj a saŇčaan, patudud ńßan tu mamuniaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu nipi ¶id…ôkan nu saŇčan a tawjuan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj a wan…ôŇčan a tunu ¶an, atu tawzi, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ti Ē~ °kukan nu asuaj a kakan…ôn. . pakuŇčkuan tu di Ē~ °tu a nipańß…ôr~…ĺak a paadińß ****** ¶iw-fun " papatinakuan tu di Ē~ °tu a kakuŇčkuan" taŇčsur~…ĺ sa patar~…ĺaw tu sar~…ĺ…ôniaj, ajda mar~…ĺiŇčatu a sikawaw, sajawaj u nipatinaku dada Ē~ °, tajda i s…ôn-pin ka ¶uduan tu panan idaw ku nipad…ôŇč tu …ôn…ômaj a di Ē~ °tuan itida, idaw ku maa ¶akaj nu di Ē~ °tuan, ir~…ĺabuaj nu bajuan nu mańßi ¶aaj nu butiŇčan a sapańß…ôr~…ĺak a patinaku. **" .
